# TRMNL Agent Skills

Auto-generated for GitHub Copilot from https://github.com/usetrmnl/trmnl-agent-skills.

Reference files are bundled in `refs/` next to this file. When working with TRMNL, the following skill instructions apply (see `instructions/<name>.instructions.md` for each):

- **trmnl** (applies to `**`) — Use when working on anything TRMNL — building plugins, writing or editing markup, designing layouts using the TRMNL CSS framework, calling the TRMNL MCP server (mcp__trmnl__*), or any task that mentions "trmnl", "e-ink display", "trmnl.com", "TRMNL plugin", "Liquid markup", "image-dither", "title_bar", or screen sizes 800x480 / 800x240 / 400x480 / 400x240. References embed the production prompts TRMNL's external MCP server ships — agent rules, the full design system template guide, and the framework v3 supplement.
